helpers.proofCommandTemplate: node campaign-x-reply-log.mjs --worker "Dexter" --proof-url "<REAL_X_REPLY_URL_OR_PRIVATE_NOTE>" --target "<@handle or tweet URL>" --query "world cup 2026 predictions" --timestamp-eest "<YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST>"

node campaign-x-reply-log.mjs --worker "Sienna" --proof-url "<REAL_X_REPLY_URL_OR_PRIVATE_NOTE>" --target "<@handle or tweet URL>" --query "world cup 2026 predictions" --timestamp-eest "<YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST>"

node campaign-x-reply-log.mjs --worker "Memo" --proof-url "<REAL_X_REPLY_URL_OR_PRIVATE_NOTE>" --target "<@handle or tweet URL>" --query "pick 3 teams world cup" --timestamp-eest "<YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST>"

node campaign-x-reply-log.mjs --worker "Nano" --proof-url "<REAL_X_REPLY_URL_OR_PRIVATE_NOTE>" --target "<@handle or tweet URL>" --query "who will win world cup 2026" --timestamp-eest "<YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST>"

proofRule: Use this only after a real manual X reply happened. Proof must be a public X reply URL, or a precise private note with account, target handle/tweet, and timestamp.
